userStories.title: Fix BOE-A-2014-12328 wrong source_url for Modelo 290 FATCA
acceptanceCriteria: Verify BOE-A-2014-12328 before updating; it is LIS, not FATCA.
Verify candidate FATCA references before using them.
Update Modelo 290 obligation provenance without changing verified=false/true semantics.
Do not set verified=false during this fix.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; URL=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT source_url FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE modelo_aeat='290' LIMIT 1"); echo "M290 source_url: $URL"; echo $URL | grep -v 'BOE-A-2014-12328' && echo PASS || echo 'FAIL: still pointing to wrong BOE reference'

userStories.title: Define MCP_TOOL_ROUTING_POLICY constant in mcp_catalog.py
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_routing_policy.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Rewrite tool descriptions - stdio MCP surface
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite stdio descriptions for listar_perfiles_entidad, obtener_obligaciones_perfil, calendario_obligaciones_perfil, buscar_modelos_aeat_catalogo and buscar_norma_eu.
Inject MCP_TOOL_ROUTING_POLICY into obtener_obligaciones_perfil and calendario_obligaciones_perfil.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_stdio_tool_descriptions.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Rewrite tool descriptions - HTTP MCP surface
acceptanceCriteria: Mirror stdio descriptions in FastAPI router summaries/descriptions for perfil, modelos and norma endpoints.
Verify OpenAPI exposes the routing text.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_http_mcp_descriptions.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/openapi.json | jq '.paths["/v1/perfil/{codigo}/obligaciones"].get.description' | grep -i 'calendario' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Verify tools/list output agent receives
acceptanceCriteria: Verify stdio tools/list descriptions and document HTTP MCP verification in docs/mcp-architecture.md.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_tools_list_output.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix form_completeness vs obligation_context separation in 289/290 response
acceptanceCriteria: Verify Modelo 289/290 response separates form completeness from obligation context.
Fix only if current implementation conflates the layers.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_modelo_obligation_context.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/289 | jq '.obligation_context | length' | awk '{if ($1>=3) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL: only " $1 " profiles"}' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite description quality and routing checks
acceptanceCriteria: Add Sprint H routing, description, Modelo 290 and calendario checks to validation suites.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint H complete
acceptanceCriteria: Run full app tests, MCP validation, deep contract audit, status checks and push branch.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
